# Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `node --check userscript/*.js` passes (if the userscript changed)
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, real exports, or personal data committed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (and version bumped in `__init__.py` + `pyproject.toml` if releasing)
- [ ] README limitations table is still honest about what does/doesn't work

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: selector changes, new Takeout shapes handled, etc. -->
